subcategory: bento grid with magnifying lens interaction
use_cases: Interactive skill or service category browser with lens magnification
Portfolio capabilities showcase with searchable offerings
Team expertise visualization with contextual focus effects
ai_summary: An interactive bento-style grid component that displays service/skill categories with a magnifying lens effect following the cursor for focused viewing. Built with motion/react for smooth animations and Hugeicons for professional iconography. Features multiple rows of categorized items including development services, DevOps, analytics, and cloud infrastructure. Responsive design adapts from mobile to desktop with optimized container heights.
